summary: Tested landing page video and mobile responsiveness. Video element is present with correct attributes but NOT PLAYING due to CORS/network issue with video URL. Mobile responsiveness is working correctly - no horizontal scroll, touch-friendly buttons, 2-column features grid.

critical.issue: Video not loading/playing - URL returns net::ERR_ABORTED in browser. Video shows poster image instead of actual video content.
critical.root_cause: Video URL from customer-assets.emergentagent.com is not accessible from browser. Curl returns 200 OK but browser fails to load. Possible CORS issue or CDN restriction.

minor.issue: muted HTML attribute not rendered in DOM (shows as empty string) though video.muted=true in JS

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix video loading issue - video URL is not accessible from browser. Options: 1) Host video on same domain, 2) Configure CORS headers on customer-assets.emergentagent.com, 3) Use a different video hosting service with proper CORS support
Verify video URL is accessible and has proper CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin)
critical_code_review_comments: Video element has correct attributes (autoplay, muted, loop, playsInline) but video fails to load
Mobile responsiveness CSS is well implemented with proper breakpoints
Touch-friendly button sizes (min 44px) are correctly applied

success_rate.frontend: 85% (video not loading is critical failure, all other mobile responsiveness tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Video element is present with data-testid='hero-video' and has correct attributes. The issue is the video URL from customer-assets.emergentagent.com is not loading in browser (net::ERR_ABORTED). Mobile responsiveness is working correctly.

video_attributes.details: autoplay=true, muted=true (JS), loop=true, playsInline=true. HTML muted attribute not rendered.

video_controls.details: Play/Pause button (data-testid='video-play-btn') and Mute/Unmute button (data-testid='video-mute-btn') present

video_playback.details: Video not loading - networkState=3 (NO_SOURCE), readyState=0, paused=true, currentTime=0

mobile_touch_friendly_buttons.details: Login button: 49x44px, Get Started: 92x44px - all >=44px height

mobile_features_grid_2col.details: Features grid shows 2 columns (174.375px 174.375px) on mobile

mobile_header_optimized.details: Header height: 54px, logo and buttons properly sized

reproduction_steps: 2. Scroll to video section below 'I Have an Account' button
3. Observe video shows poster image (logo) instead of playing video
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Video URL https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_user-privacy-ctrl/artifacts/mru5m27g_YouCut_20260121_141805694.mp4 is not accessible from browser. Browser console shows 'net::ERR_ABORTED' and video.networkState=3 (NO_SOURCE). The URL works via curl (HTTP 200) but fails in browser context.
potential_solutions: 1. Host video on same domain as the app
2. Configure CORS headers on customer-assets.emergentagent.com CDN
3. Use a video hosting service with proper CORS support (e.g., Cloudinary, Vimeo)
